info.name: A-to-Z Accessories API
info.description: Full API collection generated from source — every route extracted directly from route files. 🆕 NEW = hard delete / S3 / variants / bestSellerManual / Agenda jobs / role guards / unified filters. 🔧 MODIFIED = existing endpoints updated with wholesalePrice, finalPrice, isSale, or bestSellerManual logic.

item.name: Authentication
item.description: Public — no auth required. Admin login uses OTP flow; regular users receive a magic-link style welcome email.

request.description: Creates account if new. If user is ADMIN, sends 6-digit OTP via email. If role is USER, sends welcome email.
Validates the 6-digit OTP (valid 15 min). Returns accessToken on success. Admin only — role guard enforced inside controller.
Generates and emails a fresh 6-digit OTP. Admin role required (checked in controller).

item.name: Public — Home
item.description: No auth required. Single endpoint that returns best sellers, on-sale products, deal of the day, and flash sale — all fetched in parallel.

request.description:
Returns four sections in one call:

• bestSellers — up to 20 products (isBestSeller: true), diverse across categories (max 2 per category), sorted by soldItems desc. Filled up to 20 if categories are sparse.

• onSale — up to 20 products (isSale: true), diverse across categories (max 2 per category), sorted by discountPercentage desc.

• dealOfDay — active deal_of_day offer with its targetProducts populated, or null if none active.

• flashSale — active flash_sale offer with up to 20 products from offer's targetCategories (or all categories if empty), or null if none active.

All sections exclude wholesalePrice and apply isDeleted: false on every product query. All 4 are fetched in parallel via Promise.all.

response.name: 200 OK — example response shape

request.description: Returns all non-deleted categories.
Returns a single category. 404 if soft-deleted.

Unified public product list. Filters always exclude isDeleted and wholesalePrice. MODIFIED: isSale filter added; isBestSeller already existed. Both filters support true/false. Only products whose category is not soft-deleted are returned.
Fuzzy search on productName and productDescription using Fuse.js (threshold 0.3).

query.description: Optional userId to check if product is in their wishlist

request.description: Returns single product with variants populated. wholesalePrice excluded. If user query param is provided, also returns liked: true/false.
Returns a map of productId → availableItems. Used by the order system to pre-validate stock.

item.name: User
item.description: Requires Bearer token. Role: ADMIN or USER. Mounted at /user.

request.description: Only the owner of the user info record can update it (auth._id must match userInfo.user).
Only owner can delete their own user information.
Returns all user information records linked to the authenticated user's _id.
Sets user status to Offline, deletes the current access token, and clears the refreshToken cookie.

item.name: Admin — Categories
item.description: Requires Bearer token. Role: ADMIN only. 🆕 NEW role guard enforced by checkRole([ADMIN]).

request.description: Assign or unassign an icon to a category. Pass null to remove the icon.
Marks category as isDeleted: true.
Permanently deletes the category and its S3 image. Hard delete logic + S3 deletion.

item.name: Admin — Products
item.description: Requires Bearer token. Role: ADMIN only. 🆕 NEW role guard enforced by checkRole([ADMIN]).

query.description: true | false — admin can see deleted products

request.description: Admin product list — includes isDeleted filter. Uses unified filter logic.

body.raw:
{
  "productName": "Gold Ring",
  "productDescription": "18k gold ring with diamond",
  "price": 1200,
  "availableItems": 50,
  "categoryId": "<categoryId>",
  "defaultImage": "https://atozaccessories.s3.amazonaws.com/products/ring.jpg",
  "salePrice": 999,
  "expiredSale": 1735689600000,
  "albumImages": [
    "https://atozaccessories.s3.amazonaws.com/products/ring2.jpg"
  ],
  "wholesalePrice": 600,
  "isBestSeller": false,
  "variants": [
    { "color": "<colorId>", "size": "<sizeId>", "availableItems": 10 }
  ]
}

request.description: MODIFIED: now includes wholesalePrice, finalPrice (auto-computed), and variants array. isSale is auto-derived from salePrice < price.
Returns product with variants populated. Includes wholesalePrice (admin only).
MODIFIED: finalPrice is recomputed on every update. isSale auto-derived. Variants upserted: if _id present → update, else → create new.
Flips isBestSeller and sets bestSellerManual: true so the cron job does not override this product.

item.name: Release Best Seller Manual Control 🆕 NEW

request.description: Sets bestSellerManual: false — allows the cron job to manage this product's best-seller status again.
Permanently deletes product: removes defaultImage and albumImages from S3, deletes all variants, then removes DB record.
Hard-deletes a single product variant by its ID.
Sets isDeleted: true on the product.
Returns totalRevenue (delivered orders), totalOrders, totalCustomers, totalProducts.

item.name: Admin — Icons
item.description: Requires Bearer token. Role: ADMIN only. 🆕 NEW role guard enforced by checkRole([ADMIN]).

request.description: key must be unique. svg is the raw SVG string.

item.name: Admin — Colors
item.description: Requires Bearer token. Role: ADMIN only. 🆕 NEW role guard enforced by checkRole([ADMIN]).

request.description: name must be unique. hex must be a valid CSS hex color (e.g. #FFD700 or #F5C).

item.name: Admin — Sizes
item.description: Requires Bearer token. Role: ADMIN only. 🆕 NEW role guard enforced by checkRole([ADMIN]).

request.description: number must be unique. order is the display sort order (integer >= 1).

item.name: Admin — Offers
item.description:
Requires Bearer token. Role: ADMIN only. Agenda job scheduling for timed offers (flash_sale, deal_of_day). S3 deletion on offer delete/update.

Offer types:
• buy_x_get_cheapest_free — buy N items, cheapest becomes free. Requires condition.minQuantity.
• spend_x_get_discount — spend ≥ minAmount, get discountPercentage off subtotal. Requires condition.minAmount + reward.discountPercentage.
• spend_x_get_free_shipping — spend ≥ minAmount, shipping waived. Requires condition.minAmount.
• buy_x_get_free_shipping — buy N items, shipping waived. Requires condition.minQuantity.
• buy_x_get_half_price — buy N items, cheapest is half price. Requires condition.minQuantity.
• spend_x_get_free_item — spend ≥ minAmount, get free item up to freeItemMaxValue. Requires condition.minAmount + reward.freeItemMaxValue.
• deal_of_day — specific products get discountPercentage off. Requires targetProducts (non-empty) + reward.discountPercentage + timing.
• flash_sale — products in targetCategories get discountPercentage off. Requires reward.discountPercentage + timing.

query.description: buy_x_get_cheapest_free | spend_x_get_discount | spend_x_get_free_shipping | buy_x_get_free_shipping | buy_x_get_half_price | spend_x_get_free_item | deal_of_day | flash_sale

request.description: Returns offer with condition.excludedCategories, targetProducts, and targetCategories all populated.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Buy 3 Get Cheapest Free",
  "description": "Add 3 items and the cheapest one is on us",
  "isActive": true,
  "image": { "mediaKey": "offers/buy3free", "mediaUrl": "https://atozaccessories.s3.amazonaws.com/offers/buy3free" },
  "offerType": "buy_x_get_cheapest_free",
  "condition": { "minQuantity": 3, "minAmount": null, "excludedCategories": [] },
  "reward": { "discountPercentage": null, "freeItemMaxValue": null },
  "targetProducts": [],
  "targetCategories": []
}

request.description: Buy N items (minQuantity), cheapest item price set to 0 at checkout.

request.description: Spend ≥ minAmount, discount = freeItemMaxValue deducted from total (customer chooses a free item up to that value).

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Deal of the Day",
  "description": "Today only — 40% off selected products!",
  "isActive": true,
  "image": { "mediaKey": "offers/dealofday", "mediaUrl": "https://atozaccessories.s3.amazonaws.com/offers/dealofday" },
  "offerType": "deal_of_day",
  "timing": { "startDate": "2025-06-17T00:00:00.000Z", "endDate": "2025-06-17T23:59:59.000Z" },
  "condition": { "minQuantity": null, "minAmount": null, "excludedCategories": [] },
  "reward": { "discountPercentage": 40, "freeItemMaxValue": null },
  "targetProducts": ["<productId1>", "<productId2>"],
  "targetCategories": []
}

request.description: REQUIRES: targetProducts (non-empty), reward.discountPercentage, timing.startDate + endDate. Agenda activate/expire jobs are scheduled automatically. deal_of_day products are excluded from all other offer calculations.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Flash Sale — 30% Off Rings",
  "description": "Limited time flash sale on ring category",
  "isActive": true,
  "image": { "mediaKey": "offers/flashsale", "mediaUrl": "https://atozaccessories.s3.amazonaws.com/offers/flashsale" },
  "offerType": "flash_sale",
  "timing": { "startDate": "2025-06-17T10:00:00.000Z", "endDate": "2025-06-17T14:00:00.000Z" },
  "condition": { "minQuantity": null, "minAmount": null, "excludedCategories": [] },
  "reward": { "discountPercentage": 30, "freeItemMaxValue": null },
  "targetProducts": [],
  "targetCategories": ["<categoryId1>"]
}

request.description: REQUIRES: reward.discountPercentage, timing.startDate + endDate. targetCategories scopes which product categories receive the discount (empty = all categories). Agenda activate/expire jobs are scheduled automatically.
All fields optional. If image.mediaKey changes the old S3 object is deleted. Business rules are re-validated against the resolved (merged) offer state.
Cancels Agenda jobs (for flash_sale / deal_of_day), deletes S3 image, then removes DB record.

Toggles isActive. For timed offers (flash_sale / deal_of_day): deactivating cancels Agenda jobs + sets status=expired; reactivating reschedules them (throws 400 if both dates have passed). Non-timed offers just flip isActive + set status=active.

item.name: Admin — Image Slider
item.description: Requires Bearer token. Role: ADMIN only. Mounted at /slider.

request.description: imageType must be a value from DeviceTypeArr (e.g. desktop, mobile).
NOTE: uses POST method (not DELETE) — router defines it as .post('/delete/:id'). Deletes both image1 and image2 from S3, then removes DB record.

item.name: AWS (S3)
item.description: Requires Bearer token. Role: ADMIN only. Use presigned URLs to upload files directly to S3 from the client.

request.description: Returns array of { preSignedURL, mediaUrl } pairs. Client PUTs the file directly to preSignedURL. Use mediaUrl as the stored reference.
Returns a presigned DELETE URL for removing a file from S3.

item.name: Wishlist
item.description: Requires Bearer token. Role: ADMIN or USER. Mounted at /wishlist.

item.name: Shipping
item.description: Requires Bearer token. Role: ADMIN or USER. Mounted at /shipping.

item.name: Orders — User  (Bearer userToken · /order)
item.description: User-facing order endpoints. Mounted at /order. Requires USER or ADMIN role.

request.description: products use variantId. Validates variant.availableItems >= quantity. Snapshots userInfo+shipping at creation. Runs calculateOrderOffers (8 types, best saving wins). Stock deducted in MongoDB transaction. Invoice email sent fire-and-forget.
USER can only fetch their own customerId. ADMIN can fetch any.
Only allowed when status is under_review or confirmed. Restores variant stock + decrements soldItems in transaction.

item.name: Orders — Admin  (Bearer adminToken · /admin/orders)
item.description: Admin-only order endpoints. Mounted at /admin/orders. Requires ADMIN role.

request.description: Paginated (20/page). Filter by status or partial orderId suffix.

item.name: Update Order Status (confirmed / shipped / delivered / ordered / cancelled / deleted)

request.description: Handles all status transitions. cancelled → restores stock (unless already cancelled/deleted). deleted → same guard. Other statuses → simple field update.
